title: MSc Applied Data Science
description: Master program in machine learning systems, statistical modelling and large-scale data engineering. Coursework spans data visualisation, deep learning, NLP, MLOps, advanced statistics. Applied techniques to real-world domains like healthcare, finance, and education showcasing a portfolio that demonstrates end-to-end data science capabilities. A balance between technical skill and business acument.

description: Full-stack board game stats tracking and analytics platform. Community-focused with tribe-based metrics, user roles, and advanced performance analytics.

title: Machine Learning Engineer

title: BEng Engineering Systems & Design (Business Analytics). Minor in AI.
description: develops expertise in data-driven decision making, spanning predictive analytics and statistics on the descriptive side, and optimisation and reinforcement learning on the prescriptive side.
